collection.reason: Public read-only GitHub collection is represented by github_read_state; mutation methods remain unavailable.

allowed_no_cost_actions.reason: Runs on this machine only and does not call providers.
Uses unauthenticated GET requests for public repository metadata only.
Validates committed workflow wrappers without dispatching a run.
The repository is public and the workflow is restricted to standard artifact-only GitHub-hosted runner usage.
GitHub documents public-repository standard runner usage as no direct charge, but dispatching a workflow is still a GitHub write and creates Actions usage.
GitHub Pages is available for public repositories on GitHub Free, and standard GitHub-hosted runner usage for public repositories is free.
Path-based preview/staging/production lanes use the same public GitHub Pages project site.
Rollback redeploys a previous static Pages snapshot and does not touch providers, DBs, or secrets.
Checks the subagent contract without spawning workers or model runners.

answer.plain_language: The pipeline may use free public GitHub Actions and GitHub Pages for static CD, but it still forbids paid provider quota, secrets, external cloud deploys, model runners, and DB migrations.

blocked_or_gated_actions.reason: Provider quota remains frozen for this project.
The no-cost smoke does not read or require credentials.
Free installs are not a cost blocker for this user request, but MCP, plugin, hook, model runner, or DB migration changes are outside this static Pages CD plan.

mermaid.ci_cd_lanes:
flowchart TD
  local_validation["Local Validation\nautomatic=true"]
  dashboard["Dashboard Generation\nautomatic=true"]
  local_validation --> dashboard
  pages_dashboard["Pages Dashboard CD\nautomatic=true"]
  dashboard --> pages_dashboard
  preview["Preview Static CD\nautomatic=true"]
  pages_dashboard --> preview
  staging["Staging Static CD\nautomatic=true"]
  preview --> staging
  production["Production Static CD\nautomatic=true"]
  staging --> production
  rollback["Safe Static Rollback\nautomatic=false"]
  production --> rollback
  paid_gate["paid provider/API/quota gate"]
  production -. paid/provider paths blocked .-> paid_gate
mermaid.pipeline:
flowchart LR
  intake["Intake"]
  plan["Plan"]
  implement["Implement"]
  verify["Verify"]
  review["Review"]
  release_ready["Release Ready"]
  done["Done"]
  gated["Gated"]
  intake --> plan
  plan --> implement
  implement --> verify
  verify --> review
  review --> release_ready
  release_ready --> done
  plan --> gated
  implement --> gated
  verify --> gated
  note["control artifact / not evidence / not citation"]
  note -.-> intake
mermaid.rollback:
flowchart LR
  current["current Pages static site"]
  manifest["rollback manifest\nsafe_static_pages"]
  previous["previous known-good Pages snapshot"]
  deploy["deploy previous static snapshot"]
  current --> manifest --> previous
  previous --> deploy
  notice["control artifact / not evidence / not citation"]
  notice -.-> manifest

evidence_boundary.invariant: raw source != searchable document != search result != source bundle != context chunk != citation != answer

gates.reason: Provider/API/quota use, including paid, free-tier, trial-credit, or zero-dollar quota.
Secrets, credentials, PATs, deploy keys, environment secrets, or account login.
MCP, plugin, connector, or hook enablement/change.
Delete, purge, force-push, irreversible overwrite, or destructive data action.
DB migration or data mutation that cannot be rolled back automatically.
Production action with external side effects beyond safe static deploy.

workflow_artifact_audit.reason: This smoke validates artifact-only workflow wrappers locally and reads existing remote artifact metadata when available. It does not dispatch a workflow.
